_comment: Manual overrides for the /television cluster. Edit when TMDB resolution misses, when Malcolm has selected a non-default poster on Serializd, when the miniseries classifier needs to be pinned, or when seasons have been watched pre-Serializd and need to be marked. The bootstrap + incremental refresh scripts consult this file before writing the snapshot. Same posture as data/films/overrides.json — manual pins, never auto-corrected by the cleanup pass.

_schema.tmdbId: Maps Serializd showId (number, stringified as JSON key) -> correct TMDB tv id (number). Use when /tv/{serializd-showId} returns 404. Surfaces in cleanup/tmdb-unresolved.md when needed.
_schema.posterPath: Maps Serializd showId -> TMDB poster path (e.g. '/abc123.jpg'). Use when Malcolm wants to honor a non-default poster choice from Serializd that TMDB's default doesn't match.
_schema.isMiniseries: Maps Serializd showId -> boolean. True forces Show-card placement when TMDB type would otherwise route to Season cards; false forces the inverse. Surfaces in cleanup/maybe-miniseries.md as candidates.
_schema.watchedSeasons: Maps Serializd showId -> array of season numbers Malcolm has watched but never reviewed on Serializd. Pre-Serializd viewing history lives here (e.g. Game of Thrones seasons 1-8 watched live; never logged). Renders as a 'Watched · No writeup' badge on the show detail page. The bootstrap dedupes against reviewedSeasonNumbers + inProgressSeasonNumbers so a season only counts as watched-unreviewed if it has zero review activity in Serializd.
_schema.excludeFromWatching: Maps Serializd showId -> boolean. When true, the show is suppressed from /television/watching even if it has in-progress seasons. Editorial pin for perpetual / never-ending shows (talk shows, weekly variety, daily soaps) where the in-progress signal is permanent noise rather than a meaningful 'mid-watch' state. Does NOT affect SummaryPanel counts or listing-page card placement — purely a /watching display filter.

isMiniseries._comment: Triaged 2026-05-07 walkthrough. All TMDB-tagged Miniseries entries confirmed (true) except Pokémon Concierge (221301) which TMDB has wrong — season 2 was appended as additional season-1 episodes upstream, so it's actually a multi-season show. Steal (254071) overrides TMDB's Scripted tag because it reads as a single complete unit.

excludeFromWatching._comment: Perpetual shows where 'in-progress' is structurally permanent — talk-show / weekly-variety formats that will never be 'finished'. Suppressed from /television/watching only; still counted in SummaryPanel + listed on /television.
